apps.name: Lucid Ride
apps.localizedDescription: Body-state-aware motorcycle ride telemetry. HR profile via Supabase JOIN, placeholder tiles for lean angle / GPS / segments / body-state correlation until telemetry hardware is wired.

privacy.name: NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription
privacy.usageDescription: Connects to bike telemetry hardware via BLE.

privacy.name: NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription
privacy.usageDescription: Connects to bike telemetry hardware via BLE (legacy peripheral key).

privacy.name: NSMotionUsageDescription
privacy.usageDescription: iPhone IMU fallback for lean angle.

privacy.name: NSHealthShareUsageDescription
privacy.usageDescription: Reads Watch heart-rate to overlay body state on each ride.

privacy.name: NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription
privacy.usageDescription: Logs each ride as a workout in Apple Health.

apps.name: Lucid Health
apps.localizedDescription: Unified health companion - streams Whoop BLE data and logs meals with Gemini Vision to surface brain-health patterns.

privacy.name: NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription
privacy.usageDescription: Connects to Whoop via BLE (legacy peripheral key).

privacy.name: NSHealthShareUsageDescription
privacy.usageDescription: Reads health data from Apple Health for body-state correlation.

privacy.name: NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription
privacy.usageDescription: Writes recovery and HRV data back to Apple Health.

privacy.name: NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription
privacy.usageDescription: Tags meals and body-state snapshots with location.

privacy.name: NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescription
privacy.usageDescription: Background location for activity context (rides, walks).
